refnamediv.refpurpose: Select pixels within a three-channel color range.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: mask = imcolormask(image, lower, upper) mask = imcolormask(image, lower, upper, colorSpace)

listitem.para: Three-element lower bound in RGB or HSV space.
Three-element upper bound in RGB or HSV space.
Color space for the bounds: "rgb" or "hsv". Default is "rgb".
Boolean mask selecting pixels inside the requested color range.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns a boolean mask for RGB or HSV pixels between the inclusive lower and upper bounds.

refsection.title: Examples
